title: Jelajah Alam Bersama #sobatSmart Video Ads
desc: I took my audience on an immersive journey into nature for this project, use stock videos the raw, vibrant beauty of the outdoors to connect deeply with the #sobatSMART community. From the moments running my hands through the lush, dew-kissed green fields to the cinematic, wide-angle landscapes, my goal was to blend the refreshing spirit of adventure with a modern, dynamic energy. Backed by Smartfren's seamless connectivity, I designed this video to feel like a breath of fresh air inspiring my viewers to step outside, explore the natural world around them, and stay vividly connected through every step of the journey.

title: Deadline Tugas #untungadasmartfren Video Ads
desc: I created this video story titled "Deadline Tugas" to showcase the everyday struggle of dealing with tight assignment deadlines. By highlighting how a reliable internet connection saves the day, the content naturally integrates the #untungadasmartfren campaign, positioning Smartfren as the ultimate lifesaver for stressed students who need to get their work done without a hitch.

title: Digital Marketing Workshop Highlight Video
desc: My main goal with this piece was to capture the absolute best moments, the high-value insights, the active crowd engagement, and the vibrant atmosphere and package it all into a fast-paced, engaging edit that makes you feel like you were right there with us. It took some serious time to sift through all the footage and fine-tune the pacing to make sure every transition hits perfectly, but seeing the final cut come together with the thumb ready to go makes all the hours in the editing suite completely worth it.

title: Melihat Lebih Dekat Kawasan Situ Gintung Sekarang Video Ads
desc: My main goal for this project was to bring a cinematic, storytelling approach to documenting the current state of the Situ Gintung area. I capture original footage to highlight the serene yet dynamic atmosphere of the location, blending smooth pacing with polished visual transitions that capture its unique environment. By aligning the aesthetic with the community-driven spirit of the brand, I managed to create an engaging piece that resonated deeply with the audience.

title: Smartfren udah 5G! Video Ads
desc: My main objective with this video editing project utilizing original footage from Smartfren was to capture the sheer speed and impact of their new network rollout. I leaned heavily into high-energy pacing, anchoring the video around bold, glowing typography and crisp motion design to emphasize the transition into ultra-fast connectivity. By keeping the visual rhythm snappy and aligning the aesthetic with the brand’s dynamic identity, I managed to create a piece that resonated heavily with the community, ultimately gaining over 4K+ views on the Smartfren Community YouTube Channel.

title: Balada Sekolah Daring Video Ads
desc: I create with capturing the raw, emotional, and often humorous reality of remote learning through "Balada Sekolah Daring". My goal was to tell a highly relatable story about the daily struggles students and parents faced with online classes, poor connections, and the chaotic shift in the school dynamic. By blending authentic storytelling with engaging visuals and a well-paced narrative, I transformed these shared lockdown struggles into a compelling piece of content that resonates deeply with the community and highlights the true resilience of education during challenging times.

title: Sharing Password Risk Poster
desc: I designed this poster clearly and concisely explain potential dangers like account misuse, unauthorized data access, financial loss, reputational damage, and regulatory breaches. My goal was to create an infographic that uses a simple, impactful visual style to convey crucial cybersecurity information effectively to a broad audience, helping them understand why "Don't Never Share Your Password" is a vital rule.

title: The Danger of Smishing Poster
desc: I created these two posters to comprehensively address the threat of "smishing" – phishing attempts via SMS or chat. The first poster defines smishing, explains its mechanics, and provides clear prevention tips like avoiding suspicious links, activating MFA, and regularly updating software. The second poster then dives into specific "smishing" modus operandi, offering concrete examples of deceptive messages such as fake prize notifications, delivery confirmations, and urgent requests from contacts. My objective was to equip users with the knowledge to identify and avoid these scams, safeguarding their data and identity.

title: Don't save source code, usernames, and passwords in a public repository Poster
desc: I created this poster to emphasize the critical warning against storing sensitive information like source code, usernames, and passwords in public repositories for EMASKU Developers. I visually illustrated six fatal consequences, from data leaks and misuse to compliance violations and the inherent persistence of Git history. My aim was to clearly communicate that cyber threats often stem from our own negligence, not just external actors, encouraging vigilance and secure practices.

title: Kali365 Threat Security Alert Poster
desc: I developed this series of three posters to clearly communicate the threat of the Kali365 security vulnerability. The first poster serves as a security alert, introducing the Kali365 attack method that bypasses MFA using AI. The second poster visually breaks down the step-by-step flow of the attack, making a complex process understandable. Finally, the third poster provides actionable prevention steps, guiding users on how to protect themselves by emphasizing strong passwords, MFA, phishing awareness, and secure data storage practices. My goal was to demystify this sophisticated cyber threat and empower users with essential knowledge for defense.

title: STOP Believing Suspicious Messages Claiming to Be From a Specific Agency! Poster
desc: I created these two posters to educate users on cyber security, specifically targeting scam prevention. The first poster highlights why suspicious messages should be avoided, explaining common manipulation tactics. The second poster details various scamming modus operandi like phishing and pharming, and provides crucial tips for prevention, emphasizing official communication channels and secure digital practices. Both designs aim for clear communication and actionable advice to protect users from cyber threats.

title: Risk of Online Gambling Poster
desc: I crafted this poster to be impactful and informative, utilizing a clear, concise layout with strong visual elements and a direct call to action. My aim was to educate the public on the dangers of online gambling and encourage responsible digital practices. Distributed via internal employee channels.

title: Waspada Penipuan dengan Modus Pengiriman Uang
desc: This Instagram post is designed in a simple style yet conveys crucial information. It is intended for Pegadaian employees and customers to help them avoid fraud impersonating the institution or money transfer services.

title: Waspada Penipuan Yang Mengatasnamakan Pegadaian
desc: This Instagram post features a minimalist design that effectively conveys necessary information. It aims to reduce the potential for cyberattacks targeting Pegadaian employees and customers.

title: Security Awareness Standing Banner
desc: I created this stand banner for EMASKU's "Security Awareness Training Program" with a focus on clear and engaging communication. I chose a bright yellow gradient and a friendly central image to immediately capture attention. Each security tip is presented with a clear icon and concise text, ensuring the information is easy to digest. The modern typography and well-organized contact details contribute to a professional and approachable design that effectively conveys crucial cybersecurity messages.

title: Phishing Bukan Ancaman Siber Sembarangan!
desc: I designed a cybersecurity awareness video in an explainer format, utilizing voiceover dubbing to convey information clearly. I combined AI-generated footage with real assets to create a dynamic visual experience. The tone is intentionally serious to emphasize the ongoing threat of phishing, and the video is distributed internally to employees.

title: Jangan Mudah Terbuai dengan Rayuan Social Engineering!
desc: I developed a cybersecurity awareness video in an explainer format, complete with voiceover dubbing and supporting assets. My aim was to highlight the severe consequences of social engineering attacks, which are unfortunately still very common. I opted for a serious and even threatening tone to instill a strong sense of urgency and heighten awareness among our employees. This video is intended for internal distribution through employee channels.

title: Jangan Sampe Nyesel, Save Password di Browser Belum Tentu Aman!
desc: I crafted this cybersecurity awareness video as an explainer, using voiceover dubbing and supporting footage to illustrate the dangers of credential leaks from browser-saved passwords. I chose a serious tone to underscore the very real and continuous risk this common digital habit poses. This video is slated for internal distribution across employee channels.

title: Phishing Email Indicators
desc: I designed a cybersecurity awareness video utilizing a handwriting animation style to ensure an engaging and dynamic visual experience. The content focuses on key indicators of phishing emails, presented in a tone that is serious yet approachable, making complex information digestible without being overly technical. This video will be distributed via internal employee channels.

title: Cinta itu Memang Buta, tapi Jangan Buta dengan Ancaman Siber!
desc: I developed a Valentine's Day cybersecurity awareness video using an explainer format with voiceover dubbing, opting against an on-screen presenter or avatar to keep the focus purely on the content. I covered real cyber attack scenarios prevalent around Valentine's Day, alongside practical prevention tips. The tone is serious and informative, ensuring the crucial message lands clearly despite the seasonal theme. This video will be distributed via internal employee channels.

title: Phishing: Jebakan dari Ujung Jari
desc: produced a cybersecurity awareness video utilizing a monologue-style explainer format, aligning with the current trend of direct-to-camera storytelling. I aimed for a serious, focused tone to underscore the very real threat of phishing attacks in our daily digital interactions. This video is intended for distribution through internal employee channels.

title: Cyber Scam Awareness Video Ramadhan
desc: A live action cybersecurity awareness video highlighting common digital fraud schemes targeting employees and customers during Ramadhan. Built around real-world scenarios with talent acting out each case, the video balances a tense, suspenseful tone with light humor to keep the message engaging without feeling intimidating. Distributed via Pegadaian internal channels.

title: Indonesia’s 76th Independence Day: Apa arti kemerdekaan tahun ini?
desc: With this video, I really wanted to explore what independence truly means to people today, moving beyond just the formal celebrations of the Independence Day Video. I hit the ground to capture raw, authentic community perspectives, like filming outside the Tangerang Selatan souvenir center to contrast the official spirit of national pride with everyday local realities. It’s a reflective, documentary style piece aimed at sparking a deeper conversation about our current state of freedom and community identity, wrapped up in a thought provoking edit that I hope resonates on a personal level with the audience.

title: Ekspresikan Kreativitasmu bersama Smartfren GOKIL MAX Video Ads
desc: My goal for this video was to capture the energetic essence of the "Ekspresikan Kreativitas" campaign at ITB Ahmad Dahlan (Socio Technopreneur University). I framed the narrative around empowering students to unleash their digital potential, utilizing Smartfren's signature bold pink branding to create high-contrast, impactful visuals. By blending dynamic campus footage with crisp motion graphic framing, I structured a fast-paced, inspiring story that connects directly with young tech-savvy creators, motivating them to push their creative boundaries and express themselves fully.

title: Smartfren GOKIL MAX Video Ads
desc: I create this project in a high-energy promotional video for Smartfren's Gokil Max package. My focus was on delivering a bold, mobile-first visual experience by combining dynamic motion graphics and kinetic text that perfectly match the brand's vibrant identity. By keeping the rhythm fast-paced and the layout clean, I successfully transformed an everyday internet product promotion into an exciting, visually engaging story that captures attention instantly and connects directly with the community.

title: Real Estate ID Card
desc: I used a clean and professional aesthetic style. The front prominently displays the company logo, the word "PERS," and the cardholder's name and title. A professional portrait is included, and the company's location is subtly placed at the bottom. The overall layout uses a vibrant color scheme with geometric accents, creating a modern and engaging look. The reverse side, titled "PERHATIAN", outlines important rules and contact information regarding the ID card's use and replacement, maintaining a clear and informative presentation.

title: Music Competition Banner
desc: This competition banner effectively uses a warm, earthy color palette of browns, tans, and reds to create an inviting yet dynamic feel. The design features a stylized illustration of a vocalist on the left, balanced by a vintage microphone graphic on the right, both set against a subtle musical equalizer pattern. Prominent typography for the event title, along with clear sections for sponsors, supporters, and media partners, ensures all key information is easily digestible. The inclusion of social media handles at the bottom provides a clear call to action, rounding out a well-organized and visually appealing promotional piece.

title: Music Concert Banner
desc: This banner effectively blends traditional Indonesian cultural elements with a musical theme. The earthy color palette and background patterns create a rich, warm aesthetic, while the prominent typography and clear layout ensure key event details, including the date and location, are easily digestible. The inclusion of traditional puppet imagery and what appears to be a musical ensemble adds cultural depth, reinforcing the tagline.

title: Instituion Logo
desc: The INSATA WBQ logo masterfully blends organic and geometric elements to convey its core identity. The stylized depiction of grains, rendered in a warm, inviting orange, immediately evokes a connection to agriculture and natural resources, specifically sorghum and aren as suggested by the sub-text. This organic motif is expertly balanced by the bold, sans-serif typography of 'INSATA WBQ' in black, establishing a strong, modern, and professional presence. The clean lines and clear hierarchy ensure legibility and memorability, making it an effective mark for an institution focused on integrated development.

title: Partition Work Highlight
desc: This highlight video serves as compelling evidence of the company's capability to execute projects according to plan, consistently delivering optimal results. It is an invaluable asset for presentations to prospective clients and functions as a vital component of our corporate archives.

title: Floor Sticker Work Highlight
desc: This highlight video serves as compelling evidence of the company's capability to execute projects according to plan, consistently delivering optimal results. It is an invaluable asset for presentations to prospective clients and functions as a vital component of corporate archives.

title: Cutting Sticker Work Highlight
desc: This highlight video serves as compelling evidence of the company's capability to execute projects according to plan, consistently delivering optimal results. It is an invaluable asset for presentations to prospective clients and functions as a vital component of corporate archives.

title: Construction Work Highlight
desc: This highlight video serves as compelling evidence of the company's capability to execute projects according to plan, consistently delivering optimal results. It is an invaluable asset for presentations to prospective clients and functions as a vital component of corporate archives.

title: Document Safety Sharing Poster
desc: This poster effectively communicates crucial data security practices within an organization, particularly for Google Drive, through its direct and action-oriented design. The bold "STOP! JANGAN ASAL BERBAGI" (STOP! DON'T JUST SHARE) immediately grabs attention, while the clear, numbered steps and visual example of a sharing interface make the instructions easy to follow, ultimately empowering users to safeguard company data.

title: Data Theft Poster
desc: This data theft awareness poster powerfully conveys the severity of data breaches through its striking visual of a hooded figure with a laptop, immediately establishing a sense of threat. The clear, concise breakdowns of hacker activities, paired with relevant icons, make the abstract concept of data theft tangible and educates the audience on the real-world implications of compromised data.

title: Social Engineering Poster
desc: This poster effectively warns against social engineering by vividly illustrating its manipulative nature and various attack methods. The impactful imagery of a puppet master and fearful individuals immediately conveys the sense of being controlled and vulnerable, while clear examples like phishing and smishing make the abstract concept relatable and actionable for the audience.

title: Insider Threat Poster
desc: This poster effectively raises awareness about insider threats through a clear, well-structured design. It concisely defines the threat, categorizes different types of insider actors, and outlines their activities and prevention steps, making complex information easily digestible and impactful for the audience.

title: Doxing Alert Poster
desc: This poster effectively educates about doxing with a striking title, relevant visuals, and clear details on types, attack methods, and prevention tips. Its digestible design, with icons and bullet points, creates a strong digital security awareness campaign.

title: Social Media Safety Poster
desc: This poster effectively conveys a crucial message about digital privacy and the risks of oversharing on social media. The design immediately grabs attention with a bold, declarative headline: "GAK Semua Harus Dibagikan ke Media Sosial" (Not Everything Should Be Shared on Social Media). The use of distinct sections for "RISIKONYA" (The Risks) and "CONTOH KASUS" (Case Example) provides a well-organized and impactful presentation of information. The combination of a strong visual of a woman signaling to stop, coupled with clear icons and concise explanations of cyber threats and a real-world example of identity theft, creates a compelling and cautionary narrative. The overall design emphasizes the importance of data security and encourages users to be more mindful of their online presence.

title: Online Gambling Poster
desc: This two-part poster series powerfully warns against the dangers of online gambling through a visually striking and informative design. The first poster uses compelling imagery of a "BIG WIN" slot machine juxtaposed with common online threats like phishing, carding, and malware, effectively illustrating the deceptive nature of these schemes. The second poster reinforces the warning with a dramatic visual of a man in distress, further emphasizing the negative consequences, and provides clear, actionable reasons to avoid online gambling. The impactful use of bold typography, strong colors, and illustrative icons creates a memorable and urgent message, designed to deter engagement with online gambling.

title: Data Privacy Poster
desc: This poster effectively communicates the critical message of data loss prevention through its impactful visual hierarchy and clear, concise benefits. The design strategically guides the viewer's eye from the compelling headline, "CEGAH KEHILANGAN DATA PENTING ANDA DARI KEJADIAN YANG TAK TERDUGA" (Prevent Your Important Data Loss from Unexpected Events), to a well-structured list of advantages. The overall impression is one of urgency and reassurance, empowering users to protect their valuable information.

title: Eid Al-Adha Wallpaper
desc: This Eid Al-Adha themed wallpaper masterfully blends traditional Islamic architectural elements with modern, clean graphics to deliver a crucial cybersecurity message. The soft, harmonious color palette, dominated by soothing greens and warm whites, creates a serene and inviting visual experience. Thoughtful placement of text, utilizing varied font weights and colors, effectively highlights key information, while subtle background patterns add depth without distracting. The layout guides the eye seamlessly from the festive greeting to the actionable security tips, ensuring both aesthetic appeal and clear communication.

title: Happy New Year and Christmas Wallpaper
desc: This wallpaper design goes beyond a simple seasonal greeting; it functions as a critical piece of visual communication. The core challenge was balancing the warm, celebratory spirit of the holiday season with a sharp, urgent message: the vital need for digital vigilance against online scams exploiting the festive rush. Through deliberate composition and hierarchy, the visual elements are engineered to raise awareness seamlessly without overshadowing the festive essence.

title: Risk Culture Framework Wallpaper
desc: This wallpaper pairs bold, high-contrast typography with a clean circular infographic to deliver a powerful leadership message instantly. Set against a moody, dramatically lit architectural background, the composition balances corporate information with a sophisticated, modern aesthetic.

title: Data Protection Wallpaper
desc: Minimalism meets cybersecurity in this conceptual workspace awareness campaign. By pairing a behavior-driving mascot with crisp, layout-driven data points, I created a frictionless visual guide for employee compliance. The design proves that the most powerful defense against data breaches begins right at the user's desk.

title: Ransomware Wallpaper
desc: A moody nocturnal cityscape blurs into the background, grounding the threat in the familiar urban reality where ransomware silently operates. The composition forces a stark confrontation between the victim's laptopit s red "DATA ANDA TELAH TERKUNCI!" alert acting as the visual anchor and the Indonesian currency and newspaper in the foreground, grounding the abstract cyber threat in tangible, local consequences.

title: Media Ads Company Logo
desc: A new brand identity for a established company operating across property development, construction, media advertising, and general contracting. The design direction called for a minimalist aesthetic that is purposeful and direction-driven visually capturing the company's vision and forward momentum.

title: Real Estate Company Logo
desc: A brand identity for a new property and construction company. Minimalist in style, yet intentional and directional to capturing the company's purpose and strategic direction.

desc: A detailed house promotion banner covering everything from the facade to the floor plan, along with several benefits of choosing this property. With a clear and strong CTA.

title: Wallpaper of Using Generative AI Wisely
desc: This wallpaper effectively uses a clean, light-themed design to convey critical information about AI risks and data protection, ensuring clarity and ease of understanding for employees. The clear visual hierarchy and concise messaging contribute to an impactful and accessible awareness campaign.

title: Wallpaper of Cyber Fraud
desc: This project aims to raise employee awareness of cyber fraud impersonating specific institutions. The light theme ensures the material is clear and easily understood, enhancing the effectiveness of the awareness campaign

title: Film Billboard Design
desc: Billboards for animated film promotions attract attention with large, colorful visuals of beloved characters, building awareness and curiosity among families and children. They also reinforce key details like release dates and taglines in high-traffic areas, supporting broader marketing campaigns.

desc: This Wallapaper effectively illustrates common scam tactics that impersonate "EMASKU" and offers six clear tips to avoid becoming a victim of "scamming." The visual prominently features a smartphone displaying a fake message with a "SCAM" stamp, making the warning immediately understandable and actionable for the audience.

title: TemanKreasi Tangerang Selatan Video Profile
desc: My goal with this project was to capture the vibrant energy and collaborative spirit of our local creative community. I wanted the audience to feel the passion behind our projects, showcasing the diverse talents and faces that make this community unique while keeping the visual storytelling dynamic and engaging from start to finish.

title: TemanKreasi Pekalongan Video Profile
desc: This video profile project focuses on dynamic storytelling techniques, blending informative interview clips with smooth transitions and fresh greenhouse B-roll footage to keep the audience engaged. The use of appropriate pacing and the synchronization of audio and visual elements in this video successfully reinforce the message of community innovation and brand professionalism that the project aims to convey.

title: Fraud Alerts Email Poster
desc: This posters designed with a dark background and high-contrast white text, ensuring key information is immediately and clearly conveyed. Each point is further enhanced by illustrative icons, visually reinforcing its core message.

title: Secure Design Principles for Developer Email Poster
desc: This posters designed with a dark background and high-contrast white text, ensuring key information is immediately and clearly conveyed. Each point is further enhanced by illustrative icons, visually reinforcing its core message.

title: Safety Ramadhan Tips
desc: Using a theme aligned with the spirit of Ramadan, combined with steps and tips for employees to observe their worship safely and comfortably.

title: Phishing Email Poster
desc: This two-part infographic effectively communicates a cybersecurity warning against phishing through clean, minimalist design and strong visual metaphors. The first slide graphically depicts the threat with a worried figure and a phishing lure, while the second offers a memorable "3K" strategy, reinforced by a clear lightbulb icon, to combat it.

title: Specific Institutions Cyber Fraud Email Poster
desc: This two-slide campaign employs a clean, modern aesthetic with a focus on bold typography and strategic use of red accents to highlight key warnings. The first slide effectively poses a rhetorical question about trusting suspicious messages in "2026," while the second visually reinforces the manipulative nature of scammers with an illustrative phone screen showing a "SCAM" notification.

title: Online Gambling Scam Email Poster
desc: The digital graphic effectively utilizes a stark visual metaphor of a mousetrap and a fishing hook to symbolize the deceptive allure and perilous consequences of online gambling. Its bold typography and contrasting color palette immediately convey a powerful public awareness message, urging caution against the depicted "trap."

title: Real Estate Services Logo
desc: A minimalist logotype design for a real estate website. Where brand strength meets healthy competition. At its core, this logo embodies a brand that stands tall in a competitive market, projecting stability, trust, and a commanding presence in the home buying and selling industry. Every letterform is crafted to whisper sophistication while shouting reliability for serving the customer.

title: Banner
desc: Real Estate Company Banner

title: Cybersecurity Wallpaper Compilations
desc: A cybersecurity wallpaper for all employees keeps security awareness visible at all times, reinforcing safe habits and a unified security-first culture across the organization.

title: Social Engineering Wallpaper
desc: This wallpaper highlights the consequences of social engineering cyberattacks and how to prevent them.

title: Organization ID Card
desc: This design features a clean and modern aesthetic with a vibrant orange and white color scheme. The front prominently displays a circular photo holder, name, and member number, alongside the organization's logo and name. The back offers a striking, minimalist design with the "KOPMA" acronym in a large, vertical orientation, framed by playful orange circular elements and subtle patterned textures. Both sides effectively utilize negative space, creating a professional yet approachable identity for the student cooperative.

title: Totebag Design
desc: I designed this minimalist-style tote bag to ensure that the brand or message is immediately recognizable to users.

title: Scam AI Wallpaper/Poster
desc: This brainstorming project talks about the dangers of mobile scams.

title: Cybersecurity AI Avatar
desc: This avatar I designed with a clean and professional aesthetic, featuring a friendly expression that fosters trust and approachability in cybersecurity contexts. The subtle detailing in the attire and accessories adds a touch of sophistication, making it suitable for a range of professional and educational materials.

title: AI Poster
desc: AI-Generated Coffee Promotion Poster

title: Credential Leaks Wallpaper
desc: A clean, light-blue illustration pairs a 3D "forgot password" interface and security icons on the left with a stark warning on the right against saving passwords in browsers, driving home the message that credential leaks are inevitable. Three consequence icons below identity theft, financialloss, and reputation damage anchor the risk in tangible, high-stakes outcomes.

title: The danger of online gambling Wallpaper
desc: A dark, dramatic composition contrasts the illusion of online gambling riches on the left floating gold coins, poker chips, and a slot machine against a desperate figure on the right clutching his head in distress, visually communicating that behind every promise of easy money lies malware, stolen data, and financial ruin.

title: Natural Disaster Emergency Response Awareness Wallpaper
desc: The infographics goal is to equip employees and the organization with a clear, cyclical preparedness framework that moves from readiness → response → recovery → limited operations → restoration → back to normal, minimizing casualties and asset loss during floods or landslides.

title: Prevent demonstration disruption Wallpaper
desc: An infographic outlining eight practical steps to anticipate and mitigate the impact of demonstrations on the workplace. Covering employee mobility (public transport), safety protocols (avoiding glass areas, managing gate access), asset protection (securing documents, data backup), emergency readiness (first aid kits, emergency contacts), and real-time situation monitoring. The goal is to ensure business continuity, personnel safety, and asset security before, during, and after civil unrest near the office.

title: Social Media Security
desc: A dark theme designed to keep the audience focused, paired with graphic elements that represent security and safety in social media use. Key points are presented clearly and concisely.

title: Fake QR Code Wallpaper
desc: This wallpaper is designed to alert employees to the rising threat of fake QR code scams where malicious codes are placed in public spaces to hijack devices and steal credentials. The headline drives home a simple but critical preventive measure: always verify the source before scanning.

title: Voice Phishing Wallpaper
desc: This wallpaper is designed to alert employees to the rising threat of voice phishing scams. The headline drives home a simple but critical preventive measure: do not answer calls from unknown numbers. By making that split-second decision instinctive, the visual aims to help employees avoid devastating financial losses and data breaches that these scams routinely cause. From a designer's perspective, the composition uses bold typography and a stark, high-contrast palette to create urgency, while the imagery visually contrasts a safe choice (ignoring the call) against a dangerous one (picking up)—making the message immediate and unforgettable.

title: Data Privacy Law Wallpaper
desc: Designed with a minimalist approach to help the audience stay focused on the key points at a glance.

title: Smartfren e-SIM Video Ads
desc: I produce this ads with motion graphics style to powerfully introduce Smartfren's new e-SIM product, complemented by animated infographics that guide users through the product's step-by-step usage.

title: Smatfren #RejekiWOW Campaign Video
desc: For this project, which proudly took home 2nd Winner of the Smartfren Community Video Competition, I leaned into a bold, mobile-first aesthetic. I anchored the creative direction around Smartfren's signature hot pink and high-contrast white palette, using playful geometric motion design and kinetic text to drive a high-energy visual rhythm. My goal was to transform a standard promotional push for the MySmartfren app into an engaging, gamified treasure hunt experience. By using smooth transitions and strategic typography, I seamlessly guided the viewer through the user journey from daily check-ins to data package purchases, ensuring the design balanced strong brand identity with an exciting user experience.

title: Real Estate Logo
desc: The minimalist logo concept for a mountain or hilltop retreat is brought to life through the graphic elements within the design, instantly sparking curiosity and drawing potential guests in to imagine the experience of staying high above the clouds.

title: Company Profile
desc: This video comprehensively highlights the key aspects of the company's leading services, showcasing various achievements and project highlights that significantly reflect our expertise and positive impact within the industry.
